reviews.review_description: I’m extremely disappointed with this game. The graphics are outdated and poorly rendered, lacking any detail or visual appeal. The controls are unresponsive and clunky, making the gameplay experience frustrating and unenjoyable. There’s also a noticeable delay in response time, which ruins the overall flow and makes it almost unplayable.  Given how unpolished and poorly executed this game is, I am requesting a full refund immediately. It does not meet even the most basic expectations of quality, and I regret purchasing it

developer_response.body: Hi, sir our team is working on update of this game and I hope you get the next update soon and bug free... Thank you for your time suggestions..
